rewrite.text:
PROVE plus_zero_id: ∀n. n + 0 = n
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : ℕ
  GOAL: n + 0 = n
  INDUCTION n
    PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0
      SIMPLIFY LHS: 0 + 0 = 0 [BY plus_0_0]
      THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0
      CONCLUDE: 0 + 0 = 0 [QED]
    PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S m
      ASSUME m : ℕ
      INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: ∀k. k + 0 = k
      SIMPLIFY LHS: S m + 0 = S (m + 0) [BY plus_s_s]
      APPLY ih SPLIT INTO: (1) m + 0 = m
      PROVE (1) m + 0 = m:
        THEREFORE m + 0 = m [BY ih]
        CONCLUDE: m + 0 = m [QED]
      SIMPLIFY RHS: S m [BY successor_def]
      THEREFORE S m + 0 = S m
      CONCLUDE: S m + 0 = S m [QED]
  CONCLUDE: By induction on n, n + 0 = n for all n [QED]
END

skeleton.text:
intros n.
induction n.
- admit.
- admit.
